title: Terrible Gifts | #shorts
full_text: mom I bought you such beautiful flowers I got your favorite kind so why would you buy a flower that has already been bloomed mom I look at how many clothes buds there are look no but you have to buy one where every single one is CL you basically lost all the value of the flowers well there's only one that's open it look it looks I can't you wasted money on this one I can't right now
